Description: A tiny shard of volcanic glass that channels raw fire energy into the blade.
A polished ember crystal that causes wounds to smoulder on impact.
A flawless sun-stone that engulfs each strike in a column of flame.
A sliver of eternal frost that chills incoming blows and slows attackers.
A frozen teardrop gem that encases deflected strikes in a thin sheet of ice.
A faultless glacier shard that freezes everything it touches for an instant.
A crackling amber stone that discharges a static spark with each hit.
A storm-forged crystal that causes arcing lightning to leap between foes.
A singularity of pure storm energy that calls thunder with every blow.
A void-touched obsidian shard that drains vitality from enemies struck.
A shadow-core crystal that shrouds attacks in fell energy
A radiant celestial gem so pure it scorches dark-touched enemies for extra damage.
